name: Hungarian Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. The chicken should be about 3 1/2 lb. in size, and cut up into serving pieces.
2. Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a plastic bag. Shake the chicken, a few pieces at a time, in the flour mixture.
3. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large skillet. Saute onion until tender.
4. Remove from pan and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, melt remaining butter and brown the chicken on all sides.
6. Combine tomato juice, paprika, sugar, and salt in a bowl.
7. Pour over the chicken.
8. Add bay leaf, broth, and reserved onion.
9. Cover and simmer 45-60 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Remove chicken to a platter; keep warm.
10. Reduce heat to low, remove bay leaf, and stir in sour cream. Heat through for 2-3 minutes. Do not boil.
11. Pour sauce over chicken and noodles. Serve immediately.
